hero.hero_title_1:
Deliver Managed DBaaS
on Any Kubernetes
hero.hero_description: Give your customers production-grade databases across 25+ engines with full automation, data sovereignty, and white-label branding.

why_msp.title: Built for Managed Service Providers
why_msp.description: Offer hyperscaler-grade Database-as-a-Service while keeping full control, branding, and higher margins.

features.title: White-Label Ready
features.description: Deliver fully branded DBaaS to your customers. Your logo, your portal, your pricing.

features.title: Recurring Revenue
features.description: Usage-based metering (RAM/GB) makes it easy to bill customers monthly with predictable margins.

features.title: Data Sovereignty
features.description: Run databases anywhere — on-prem, edge, air-gapped, or sovereign clouds — perfect for regulated clients.

benefits.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
benefits.description: Complete platform to build and scale your managed database business

items.title: Complete Platform
items.description: Everything needed to run production DBaaS — monitoring, backups, HA, security, and billing APIs built-in.

items.title: Flexible Monetization
items.description: Built-in metering APIs for RAM, storage, and usage tracking. Bill customers your way with transparent cost allocation.

items.title: Rapid Time-to-Market
items.description: Launch your managed DBaaS offering in weeks, not months. Full technical onboarding and documentation included.

items.title: Enterprise Support
items.description: 24×7 enterprise support, SLAs, dedicated technical account management, and co-marketing opportunities.

core_features.title: One Platform. 25+ Databases.
core_features.description: Full lifecycle automation for production databases

items.title: Self-Service Provisioning
items.description: Developers deploy databases instantly via Kubernetes CRDs, CLI, or your branded portal.

items.title: Automated HA & Failover
items.description: Built-in replication, leader election, and self-healing across any environment.

items.title: Database-Aware Backups
items.description: Powered by KubeStash — consistent, incremental, encrypted backups to any storage.

items.title: Multi-Tenancy & RBAC
items.description: Secure tenant isolation, fine-grained access control, and centralized governance.

items.title: Unified Observability
items.description: Prometheus metrics, Grafana dashboards, and centralized logging for all databases.

items.title: GitOps & Automation
items.description: Native support for ArgoCD, Flux, and declarative management.

databases.title: Comprehensive Database Support
databases.description: 25+ database engines managed with Kubernetes-native workflows

categories.engines: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, Percona XtraDB

items.quote: Launched white-label DBaaS for 20,000+ customers in under a month with KubeDB.
items.author: Public Cloud Provider

items.quote: 10× cost reduction vs MongoDB Atlas while offering better control to our enterprise clients.
items.author: DEDICATTED (IT MSP)

items.quote: Telco-grade automation across our entire Kubernetes fleet.
items.author: Orange Telecom

left.title: Join the KubeDB MSP Family
left.description: Get Started Today. Try KubeDB for free to learn how you can elevate your MSP offerings with KubeDB's advanced Kubernetes database automation and white-label DBaaS platform.

right.title: Connect with us to Learn More
right.description: Reach out for a personalized consultation to request a demo. Learn how KubeDB can be integrated into your service portfolio, and how leading MSPs use KubeDB to deliver value to their clients.

form.title: Become a KubeDB MSP Partner
form.description: Fill out the form below and our MSP team will contact you within 24 hours.
